mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pipeline_step (execution_id, step_order, step_type, step_name, status) VALUES
(#{executionId}, #{s.stepOrder}, #{s.stepType}, #{s.stepName}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT id, execution_id, step_order, step_type, step_name, status, log, started_at, completed_at FROM pipeline_step WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} ORDER BY step_order
mapper.update: UPDATE pipeline_step SET status = #{status}, log = #{log}, started_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RUNNING' AND started_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE started_at END, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, execution_id, step_order, step_type, step_name, status, log, started_at, completed_at FROM pipeline_step WHERE status = 'WAITING_WEBHOOK' AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute' * #{minutes}
